---
title: "Rapport de prédiction COICOP"
subtitle: "Distribution des prédictions et analyse du consensus"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
# | tags: [setup]
import os
from textwrap import dedent

import duckdb
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.ticker as mticker
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
from IPython.display import Markdown

sns.set_theme(style="whitegrid")

INPUT = os.environ["REPORT_INPUT_PATH"]
DECIDE_PATH = os.environ.get("REPORT_DECIDE_PATH", "")
RUN_ID = os.environ.get("REPORT_RUN_ID", "(inconnu)")
RUN_DATE = os.environ.get("REPORT_RUN_DATE", "(inconnu)")

con = duckdb.connect()
con.sql("INSTALL httpfs; LOAD httpfs;")
endpoint = (
    os.environ.get("AWS_S3_ENDPOINT")
    or os.environ.get("AWS_ENDPOINT_URL", "").replace("https://", "").replace("http://", "")
    or "minio.lab.sspcloud.fr"
)
con.sql(
    dedent(
        f"""
        CREATE OR REPLACE SECRET s3_secret (
            TYPE s3,
            KEY_ID '{os.environ.get("AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID", "")}',
            SECRET '{os.environ.get("AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY", "")}',
            SESSION_TOKEN '{os.environ.get("AWS_SESSION_TOKEN", "")}',
            ENDPOINT '{endpoint}',
            URL_STYLE 'path',
            USE_SSL true
        );
        """
    )
)

df = con.sql(f"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{INPUT}')").df()
df_decide = None
if DECIDE_PATH:
    df_decide = con.sql(f"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{DECIDE_PATH}')").df()

n_total = len(df)
n_regex = int((df["prediction_source"] == "regex").sum()) if "prediction_source" in df.columns else 0
n_consensus = int((df["prediction_source"] == "consensus").sum()) if "prediction_source" in df.columns else 0
n_llm = int((df["prediction_source"] == "llm").sum()) if "prediction_source" in df.columns else 0
n_errors = int(df_decide["llm_error"].notna().sum()) if df_decide is not None and "llm_error" in df_decide.columns else 0
source_input_file = (
    df_decide["_source_input_file"].iloc[0]
    if df_decide is not None and "_source_input_file" in df_decide.columns and len(df_decide) > 0
    else None
)

LEVEL_WIDTHS = [2, 4, 6, 8, 10]
LEVEL_NAMES  = ["L1 (2 pos.)", "L2 (4 pos.)", "L3 (6 pos.)", "L4 (8 pos.)", "L5 (10 pos.)"]

PREDICTORS = {
    "LCS": "lcs_code",
    "RAG": "rag_code",
    "TTC": "ttc_code_1",
}
```

## Métadonnées du run

| Champ | Valeur |
|---|---|
| Run ID | `{python} RUN_ID` |
| Date   | `{python} RUN_DATE` |
| Fichier d'entrée | `{python} source_input_file if source_input_file else "—"` |
| Fichier de sortie final | `{python} INPUT` |
| Observations totales | `{python} f"{n_total:,}".replace(",", " ")` |
| Classées par regex | `{python} f"{n_regex:,} ({n_regex/n_total*100:.1f} %)".replace(",", " ") if n_total else "—"` |
| Consensus automatique | `{python} f"{n_consensus:,} ({n_consensus/n_total*100:.1f} %)".replace(",", " ") if n_total else "—"` |
| Arbitrées par le LLM | `{python} f"{n_llm:,} ({n_llm/n_total*100:.1f} %)".replace(",", " ") if n_total else "—"` |
| Erreurs LLM | `{python} n_errors` |

## Distribution des prédictions par niveau COICOP

```{python}
def distribution_table(n_chars):
    col = df["predicted_code"].dropna().str[:n_chars]
    counts = col.value_counts().reset_index()
    counts.columns = ["code", "nb_obs"]

    if df_decide is not None and "llm_libelle" in df_decide.columns:
        tmp = df_decide[df_decide["llm_code"].notna()].copy()
        tmp["_lvl"] = tmp["llm_code"].str[:n_chars]
        libelles = (
            tmp.groupby("_lvl")["llm_libelle"]
            .agg(lambda s: s.mode().iloc[0] if not s.mode().empty else "")
            .reset_index()
            .rename(columns={"_lvl": "code", "llm_libelle": "libellé"})
        )
        counts = counts.merge(libelles, on="code", how="left")
        counts["libellé"] = counts["libellé"].fillna("")
    else:
        counts["libellé"] = ""

    counts["% total"] = (counts["nb_obs"] / n_total * 100).round(1).astype(str) + " %"
    counts = counts.sort_values("nb_obs", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
    return counts[["code", "libellé", "nb_obs", "% total"]]
```

```{python}
for w, name in zip(LEVEL_WIDTHS, LEVEL_NAMES):
    tbl = distribution_table(w)
    display(Markdown(f"### Niveau {name}"))
    display(Markdown(tbl.to_markdown(index=False)))
```

## Source des prédictions

```{python}
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 4))

# Left: 3-way source distribution
src_labels = ["Regex", "Consensus", "LLM"]
src_values = [n_regex, n_consensus, n_llm]
src_colors = ["#FF9800", "#4CAF50", "#2196F3"]
non_zero = [(l, v, c) for l, v, c in zip(src_labels, src_values, src_colors) if v > 0]
if non_zero:
    lz, vz, cz = zip(*non_zero)
    axes[0].pie(vz, labels=lz, colors=cz, autopct="%1.1f%%", startangle=90)
axes[0].set_title("Source des prédictions")

# Right: confidence distribution (LLM-arbitrated rows only)
if df_decide is not None and "llm_confiance" in df_decide.columns and n_llm > 0:
    llm_ids = df[df["prediction_source"] == "llm"][["id"]]
    llm_conf = llm_ids.merge(df_decide[["id", "llm_confiance"]], on="id", how="left")
    conf_data = llm_conf["llm_confiance"].dropna().astype(int)
    conf_counts = conf_data.value_counts().sort_index()
    axes[1].bar(conf_counts.index, conf_counts.values, color="#2196F3", edgecolor="white")
    axes[1].set_xlabel("Score de confiance LLM (1–5)")
    axes[1].set_ylabel("Nb observations")
    axes[1].set_title("Confiance LLM (observations arbitrées)")
    axes[1].xaxis.set_major_locator(mticker.MaxNLocator(integer=True))
else:
    axes[1].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

```{python}
if df_decide is not None and "llm_confiance" in df_decide.columns and n_llm > 0:
    llm_ids = df[df["prediction_source"] == "llm"][["id"]]
    llm_conf = llm_ids.merge(df_decide[["id", "llm_confiance", "prediction_source"]].rename(
        columns={"prediction_source": "_src_decide"}), on="id", how="left")
    conf_by_src = df_decide.merge(
        df[["id", "prediction_source"]], on="id", how="left"
    ).groupby("prediction_source")["llm_confiance"].value_counts().unstack(fill_value=0)
    if not conf_by_src.empty:
        display(Markdown("**Distribution de la confiance par source de décision :**"))
        display(Markdown(conf_by_src.to_markdown()))
```

## Meilleur prédicateur par code COICOP (observations arbitrées par le LLM)

*Pour chaque groupe COICOP de niveau L2, taux d'accord de chaque prédicateur avec la décision LLM, sur les observations arbitrées (hors consensus et hors regex).*

```{python}
if df_decide is None:
    display(Markdown("*Données de décision non disponibles.*"))
elif n_llm == 0:
    display(Markdown("*Aucune observation arbitrée par le LLM.*"))
else:
    llm_ids = df[df["prediction_source"] == "llm"][["id"]]
    non_cons = llm_ids.merge(
        df_decide[["id", "lcs_code", "rag_code", "ttc_code_1", "llm_code"]],
        on="id", how="left",
    )

    non_cons["_L2"] = non_cons["llm_code"].str[:4]

    rows = []
    for grp, sub in non_cons.groupby("_L2"):
        nb = len(sub)
        rates = {}
        for name, col in PREDICTORS.items():
            if col in sub.columns:
                rates[name] = (sub[col] == sub["llm_code"]).mean()
            else:
                rates[name] = np.nan
        best = max(rates, key=lambda k: rates[k] if not pd.isna(rates[k]) else -1)
        rows.append({
            "Code L2": grp,
            "Nb obs.": nb,
            **{f"{k} ↔ LLM": f"{v*100:.0f} %" if not pd.isna(v) else "—" for k, v in rates.items()},
            "Meilleur prédicateur": best,
        })

    summary = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values("Nb obs.", ascending=False)

    best_counts = summary["Meilleur prédicateur"].value_counts()
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4))

    axes[0].bar(best_counts.index, best_counts.values, color=["#FF5722", "#9C27B0", "#FF9800"])
    axes[0].set_title("Nb de groupes L2 où chaque prédicateur est le meilleur")
    axes[0].set_xlabel("Prédicateur")
    axes[0].set_ylabel("Nb de groupes COICOP L2")

    for name, col in PREDICTORS.items():
        if f"{name} ↔ LLM" in summary.columns:
            vals = summary[f"{name} ↔ LLM"].str.replace(" %", "").replace("—", np.nan).astype(float)
            axes[1].scatter(summary["Nb obs."], vals, alpha=0.6, label=name)
    axes[1].set_xlabel("Nb observations dans le groupe L2")
    axes[1].set_ylabel("Taux d'accord avec LLM (%)")
    axes[1].set_title("Taux d'accord avec LLM par prédicateur et groupe")
    axes[1].legend()

    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

    display(Markdown("**Tableau détaillé par code L2 :**"))
    display(Markdown(summary.to_markdown(index=False)))
```

## Observations à désaccord total entre les trois prédicateurs

*Observations pour lesquelles LCS, RAG et TTC proposent chacun un code différent.*

```{python}
if df_decide is None:
    display(Markdown("*Données de décision non disponibles.*"))
else:
    pred_cols = {k: v for k, v in PREDICTORS.items() if v in df_decide.columns}

    if len(pred_cols) < 3:
        display(Markdown("*Colonnes de prédiction insuffisantes pour cette analyse.*"))
    else:
        lcs_col, rag_col, ttc_col = "lcs_code", "rag_code", "ttc_code_1"
        sub = df_decide[[
            "id", "raw_product", lcs_col, rag_col, ttc_col,
            "llm_code", "llm_confiance", "llm_explication",
        ]].dropna(subset=[lcs_col, rag_col, ttc_col])

        total_disagreement = (
            (sub[lcs_col] != sub[rag_col]) &
            (sub[lcs_col] != sub[ttc_col]) &
            (sub[rag_col] != sub[ttc_col])
        )
        disag = sub[total_disagreement].copy()

        n_disag = len(disag)
        n_all_pred = len(sub)
        pct = n_disag / n_all_pred * 100 if n_all_pred else 0

        display(Markdown(
            f"**{n_disag:,}** observations en désaccord total sur {n_all_pred:,} "
            f"observations avec les 3 prédicteurs renseignés ({pct:.1f} %)."
            .replace(",", " ")
        ))

        if n_disag > 0:
            llm_dist = disag["llm_code"].str[:4].value_counts().head(10).reset_index()
            llm_dist.columns = ["Code L2 (LLM)", "Nb obs."]
            display(Markdown("\n**Top 10 codes L2 choisis par le LLM sur ces cas :**"))
            display(Markdown(llm_dist.to_markdown(index=False)))

            if "llm_confiance" in disag.columns:
                fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 3))
                conf_vals = disag["llm_confiance"].dropna().astype(int).value_counts().sort_index()
                ax.bar(conf_vals.index, conf_vals.values, color="#E91E63", edgecolor="white")
                ax.set_title("Confiance LLM sur les cas à désaccord total")
                ax.set_xlabel("Score de confiance (1–5)")
                ax.set_ylabel("Nb observations")
                ax.xaxis.set_major_locator(mticker.MaxNLocator(integer=True))
                plt.tight_layout()
                plt.show()

            example_cols = ["raw_product", lcs_col, rag_col, ttc_col, "llm_code"]
            if "llm_explication" in disag.columns:
                example_cols.append("llm_explication")
            if "llm_confiance" in disag.columns:
                example_cols.append("llm_confiance")

            examples = disag[example_cols].sample(min(10, n_disag), random_state=42)
            examples.columns = [
                c.replace("lcs_code", "LCS").replace("rag_code", "RAG")
                 .replace("ttc_code_1", "TTC").replace("llm_code", "LLM")
                 .replace("llm_explication", "Explication LLM")
                 .replace("llm_confiance", "Confiance")
                for c in examples.columns
            ]
            display(Markdown(f"\n**{min(10, n_disag)} exemples tirés aléatoirement :**"))
            display(Markdown(examples.to_markdown(index=False)))
```
